items.name: Carrie Fisher
items.notes: Signed in blue Sharpie. One of her last signing appearances before her passing.

items.notes: Official Nike on-field jersey, size 44. Signed on the front number.

items.notes: Original 1969 UK pressing. Signed on the sleeve in black marker.

items.notes: First edition hardcover. Purchased directly from a Scribner bookstore event.
